visual_mood: Seamless wide panoramic studio shot of the Rasta Series -- designed to be split into two 4:5 carousel panels that flow into each other

layout.composition: Wide 8:5 composition. Left half: Rasta Brown as hero on dark surface with studio lighting, series name text. Right half: Rasta Red in the same scene, same surface, same lighting, continuation of the background. When split down the middle, each half works as a standalone 4:5 slide but together they form one seamless image.
layout.text_hierarchy: Series header in left panel, subtitle in right panel, logo in right panel
layout.background: Continuous dark warm charcoal surface with soft amber studio lighting flowing across both halves

product.placement: Rasta Brown in the left half of the wide image, 3/4 angle. Rasta Red in the right half, same angle, same scale. Both on the same continuous dark surface. The surface and lighting flow seamlessly between them.
product.instruction: Both sunglasses should look like real pairs photographed together in one wide studio setup -- matching the styles shown in the reference images. Same lighting, same surface, seamless background.

brand.color_scheme: Dark warm charcoal continuous surface, soft amber highlights, white text, warm tones throughout

prompt: A wide seamless studio product photograph at 8:5 aspect ratio on a continuous dark warm charcoal surface with soft amber overhead lighting. Left half features Rasta Brown sunglasses from DuberyMNL at 3/4 angle -- real matte sunglasses matching the reference image, with white headline 'THE RASTA SERIES' in the upper-left in the bold italic sporty typeface from the font reference. Right half features Rasta Red sunglasses at the same angle and scale on the same continuous surface -- the background, lighting, and surface flow seamlessly across both halves with no visible seam. Subtitle 'Bold style. Real protection.' in the upper-right. DuberyMNL logo bottom-right. Everything part of one cohesive wide photograph. 8:5 aspect ratio.
